metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_59
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Rab3C specific antibody was used to probe highly purified synaptic vesicles obtained by subcellular fractionation and CPG chromatography, revealing the enrichment of Rab3C on these vesicles.

19/01/2017 Pim
The *anchored" element in the annotation comes from figure 4 where dissociation from the SV is shown (is not integral) and the known lipid anchor of Rab proteins (including Rab3C).

Uniprot: Lipidation: S-geranylgeranyl cysteine. Experimental description: Figure legend " Synaptosomes were prepared from rat cerebral
cortex by differential centrifugation and subsequently lysed by osmotic
shock."
